text:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/install-post.html
SLIP and PPPD has been removed from the base install 8.0. 
Section 2.10.1 Network Device Configuration section change the following 
from SLIP/PPP to PPP


                   User Confirmation Requested 
   Would you like to configure any Ethernet or SLIP/PPP network devices?

                             [ Yes ]   No
